raw_consumer_statement: I overpaid My XXXX payment of {$1500.00}. I checked to see if the payment showed it was in progress and it didnt show it was paid by auto pay so I paid it again. I called the next morning to have the second payment canceled and was told I would have to wait XX/XX/10 business days before they could send it back. That was XX/XX/XXXX th. I called again aprox 7 days later again was told it would be XX/XX/10 days. Again I called on the XXXX of XXXX and at first was told it would be another XX/XX/10 days. I asked why when I was told that on the XXXX of XXXX and again when I called back. She then told me it was sent out on the XXXX. I asked to speak to a supervisor, after waiting for almost XXXX minutes she came on the line and said no one had asked for a refund. So in the meantime they took out XXXX more payments so now the overpayment has a balance of XXXX.?? Nothing should have been due until XX/XX/XXXX. Again I asked for a supervisor and asked why they are deducting payments that isnt due and when was I getting my overpayment back. You probably guessed it. Another XX/XX/10 days.
